John Doe
Senior Product Manager
john.doe@email.com | (555) 123-4567 | San Francisco, CA

SUMMARY
Results-driven Senior Product Manager with 8 years of experience leading cross-functional teams to deliver innovative B2B SaaS products. Proven track record in product strategy, roadmapping, and stakeholder management. Expert in Agile methodologies and data-driven decision making.

EXPERIENCE

Senior Product Manager
Tech Innovations Inc., San Francisco, CA
2020 - Present
• Led product strategy and roadmap for flagship B2B SaaS platform serving 500+ enterprise clients
• Managed cross-functional teams of 15+ engineers, designers, and analysts using Agile/Scrum methodologies
• Drove 40% increase in user engagement through data-driven A/B testing and experimentation
• Collaborated with stakeholders to define OKRs and KPIs, improving product-market fit
• Created comprehensive PRDs and user stories for feature prioritization and backlog management
• Conducted user research and customer interviews to inform product decisions

Product Manager
Digital Solutions Co., Palo Alto, CA
2018 - 2020
• Owned product lifecycle for mobile iOS and Android applications
• Implemented go-to-market strategy resulting in 200K+ downloads in first quarter
• Used SQL and analytics tools for data analysis to drive product improvements
• Designed wireframes and prototypes using Figma for new feature concepts
• Coordinated with engineering teams on API integrations and technical requirements

Associate Product Manager
StartupHub, San Jose, CA
2016 - 2018
• Supported senior PM in managing product backlog and sprint planning
• Conducted competitive analysis and market research
• Worked with UX/UI designers to improve user experience
• Utilized Jira and Confluence for project management and documentation

2014 - 2016

University of California, Berkeley, CA
2010 - 2014

• Product Management: Product Strategy, Roadmapping, Feature Prioritization, Product Launch, GTM Strategy
